effect: Terizla leaps up and slams down forcefully, dealing (+300%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to adjacent enemies and knocking them airborne for 0.6s, while gaining a Shield equal to 12% of his Max HP for 4s.
Clint rapidly shoots 5 bullets at the target, each dealing (+125%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG.
Eudora casts Forked Lightning, dealing (+430%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to the target and inflicting Vulnerability for 4s, increasing their DMG taken by 5%.
Hanzo deals (+220%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to the target, restores 20% lost HP, and increases Skill DMG by 20% (up to 60%).
Masha deals (+330%Total Physical ATK) Basic ATK Physical DMG to the current target and adjacent enemies (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit), gaining 70% ATK Speed and 5% Lifesteal for 3s.

Tigreal unleashes the power of his hammer, gaining a Shield equal to 10% of his Max HP for 4s. He then smashes adjacent enemies, dealing (+315%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG and stunning them for 0.6s.
Cecilion commands a bat-like beast to assault the target, dealing (+735%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG. Passive: When battle starts, provide 10 Mana to himself and allies to his left and right.

Irithel launches flaming arrows at the target, dealing (+135%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG, enhancing the next 3 Basic ATK(s). On hit, the enhanced Basic ATK deals (+320%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG. Passive: Each Basic ATK deals 3 hit(s) of (+35%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG.

Unleashes 2 sweeping slashes in a fan-shaped area in the front, dealing (+200%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to enemies. (DMG decreases for each enemy hit.) From the third cast onward, additionally releases 3 linear energy waves forward at different angles, each dealing (+110%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG.
